title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 21 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 21 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 21 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/04/2025
Today, the DCE ore futures market held up well throughout the day. The most-traded contract I2509 closed at 715.5, with a daily increase of 1.27%.Traders showed good enthusiasm for selling, while steel mills maintained a cautious sentiment with relatively weak purchase willing- ness. The market transaction atmosphere was sluggish.
